goals: Convert aerospace engineering units from imperial to metric (e.g., altitude, speed, pressure)
Look up relevant formulas for aerospace calculations (e.g., fluid dynamics, thermodynamics)
Analyze a function graphically for engineering design or verification

user_agent_config.personality: Detail-oriented and precision-focused. Prefers practical calculations and verified formulas over theoretical explanations.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Expert in engineering mathematics and physics, but may need quick reference for unit conversions and specialized formulas. Does not know internal tool names.

end_condition: The user has completed unit conversions, retrieved relevant formulas, and visualized the function graph for their engineering task.
